title: The Goose Girl
lines: A princess was sent to marry a prince in a far kingdom.
Her elderly waiting woman betrayed her and, through magic, made the princess trade places with her.
The princess was forced to become a goose girl while her attendant posed as the bride.
The prince noticed something amiss and discovered the deception.
He dressed himself as a goose boy to keep watch over the true princess.
One day the true princess combed her hair by a stream, and the waiting woman's curse was revealed.
The prince broke the spell by his true love and recognition.
The false princess was exposed and punished.
The true princess was restored to her rightful place as the bride.
She and the prince were married and ruled the kingdom together.
